scripts.build: bun run build:remark-plantuml && bun run build:tooling && bun run build:ui
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run lint && bun run fmt:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.fmt: oxfmt --config .oxfmtrc.mjs packages package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.package-aliases.json vitest.config.ts .oxfmtrc.mjs .oxlintrc.json .github/workflows/publish-packages.yml
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --config .oxfmtrc.mjs --check packages package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.package-aliases.json vitest.config.ts .oxfmtrc.mjs .oxlintrc.json .github/workflows/publish-packages.yml
scripts.publish:dry-run: bun run --cwd packages/remark-plantuml publish:dry-run && bun run --cwd packages/tooling publish:dry-run && bun run --cwd packages/ui publish:dry-run
scripts.deps:update: bunx npm-check-updates -u --workspaces --target latest --packageManager bun && bun install
